summary: Tested multi-part fix: 1) Nav dropdown z-index, 2) Restaurant ID/image fields, 3) Varied why_for_pet text per card, 4) Card-specific CTA text. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified dropdown z-index=9999 and correct card personalization.
critical_code_review_comments: Nav dropdown z-index correctly set to z-[9999] in Navbar.jsx line 1108
Restaurants API correctly auto-generates IDs for restaurants missing them (rest-{hash})
DINE_CONCIERGE_PRODUCTS and CELEBRATE_CONCIERGE_PRODUCTS have why_phrases dict for trait-specific text
Cards have specific cta_text: 'Create plan', 'Start transition', 'Curate kit', 'Request reservation', etc.
generate_why_explanation() correctly matches pet traits to card-specific why_phrases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 20 verified all multi-part fixes: 1) Nav dropdown now uses z-[9999], 2) All restaurants have 'id' and 'image' fields, 3) Concierge cards have varied why_for_pet text using card-specific why_phrases dict, 4) Cards have specific CTA text like 'Create plan', 'Start transition' instead of generic 'Create for {Pet}'.

frontend.why_for_pet_varied: PASS - Each card has unique text

nav_dropdown_zindex.verification: Dropdown z-index verified as 9999 via Playwright

restaurant_ids.fix: Auto-generates stable ID from name hash if missing

card_specific_why_for_pet.fix: Each card has why_phrases dict with trait-specific text
card_specific_why_for_pet.verification: Dine cards show: 'Fun kit for energetic dining companions', 'Predictable meals for routine-loving pets', etc.

card_specific_cta_text.fix: Each card has cta_text like 'Create plan', 'Start transition' instead of generic 'Create for {Pet}'
card_specific_cta_text.verification: CTAs verified: 'Curate kit', 'Create plan', 'Start transition', 'Request reservation', 'Request meetup'
